profile.title: Profile

avatar.label: Profile picture

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose which language Prilog should appear in.

languageOverrides.title: Language (terms)

workspace_security.aendert_das_admin-passwort_fuer_synapse_:
Change the admin password for Synapse. When you save the changes, the new password is set directly
                on the Matrix server and verified immediately upon login.
workspace_security.der_bei_der_bestellung_digital_abgeschlo: The General Terms and Conditions (AVV) agreed digitally at the time of ordering, in PDF format.
workspace_security.fuer_diesen_tenant_liegt_kein_avv_vor_ma: There is no AVV for this tenant (either a manual contract or one that has not yet been finalised).
workspace_security.avv_als_pdf_herunterladen: Download the General Terms and Conditions as a PDF
workspace_security.geblockte_uploads_in_deinem_workspace_be:
Blocked uploads in your workspace. If there is a false positive, you can whitelist the file hash —
                subsequent uploads of this file will then no longer be rejected.
workspace_security.datei-hashes_die_vom_virus-scan_ausgenom:
File hashes that are excluded from virus scanning. The best way to add entries is directly from the
                incident list above — click the “Whitelist” button next to a blocked file.

workspace_general.allgemeine_workspace-einstellungen_begru: General Workspace settings — Welcome messages and language settings.
workspace_general.flurfunk_sprachnachrichten_mit_transkrip: Word of mouth — voice messages with transcripts
workspace_general.mitarbeiter_koennen_kurze_sprachnachrich:
Staff can record short voice messages directly in the chat. A central
                Whisper instance transcribes the audio into text and automatically attaches the transcript.
                Parents and pupils can view voice messages as normal, but cannot record them themselves.
workspace_general.datenschutz_audio_wird_beim_whisper-serv:
Privacy: Audio is NOT stored on the Whisper server — it is only kept in memory during
                transcription and then discarded.
workspace_general.ohne_diesen_schalter_sehen_mitarbeiter_d: Without this toggle, staff won't be able to see the microphone button in the chat.
workspace_general.klassenlehrerin_elternabend_foerderunter: Class teacher, parents' evening, remedial lessons, timetable...
workspace_general.whisper_kennt_die_begriffe_beim_transkri: Whisper recognises terms when transcribing — it corrects proper names and technical terms.
workspace_general.workspace-name_hint: This name is shown at the top of the main window. The technical subdomain stays unchanged.
workspace_general.name_2_60_zeichen: The name must be 2–60 characters long.

tasks_reede.schwellen_fuer_die_reede_aufgaben_die_ei:
Thresholds for the holding area (tasks that become inactive) and the recycle bin (retention period
                    before items are automatically and permanently deleted).
tasks_reede.eine_aufgabe_gilt_als_schlafend_und_land:
A task is considered "dormant" and is moved to the queue if it has not been updated for X days
                    or its deadline has passed.
tasks_reede.geloeschte_aufgaben_bleiben_fuer_x_tage_:
Deleted tasks remain recoverable in the Recycle Bin for X days. After that,
                    they are automatically and permanently deleted.

system.build-version_server-status_und_technisc: Build version, server status and technical configuration.
system.welche_version_des_web-clients_laeuft_nu: Which version of the web client is running? This is useful for analysing bug reports.
system.maximale_datei-groesse_fuer_bilder_video:
Maximum file size for images, videos and documents in chat. Applies to all Spaces.
                Synapse will restart briefly when saving (~10 seconds); users will be automatically reconnected.

system_health.live-gesundheitscheck_deiner_workspace-i: Live health check of your workspace infrastructure — Synapse, Sync, rate limits.

security.der_chat-cache_speichert_nachrichten_und:
The chat cache stores messages and contact details locally in your browser.
                    When you reset it, all locally stored messages are deleted and
                    retrieved fresh from the server the next time you load the page.
security.nachrichten_fehlen_profilbilder_nicht_ge:
Messages are missing, profile pictures haven't loaded,
                    contacts aren't up to date, or display errors occur after an update.
security.du_wirst_ausgeloggt_und_zur_anmeldeseite: You will be logged out and redirected to the login page.

printers.direkt-druck_an_netzwerk-drucker_via_ipp:
Direct printing to a network printer via IPP. The printer must be accessible from the internet
                    or via VPN for the Prilog server. For local school printers
                    without a public IP address: use the browser print dialogue instead.
printers.keine_drucker_eingerichtet: No printers have been set up.
printers.name: Name
printers.drucker_muss_vom_prilog-server_aus_errei:
.
                    The printer must be accessible from the Prilog server.

plugins.vorgefertigte_flows_anleitungen_und_apps: Pre-built flows, guides and apps. Just click "Install" — and you're ready to go.
plugins.wird_zur_monatlichen_rechnung_addiert_du: This will be added to your monthly bill. You can cancel at any time — you only pay for the full period in which you install the service.

                        Clicking it opens a brief dialogue about the section you are currently in.
help.ordne_pro_app-bereich_einen_audioguide_z:
Assign an AudioGuide to each app section. Hörmi will then automatically play the relevant tutorial.

retention_settings.wie_lange_sollen_dokumente_aufbewahrt_we:

retention.blockt_automatische_loeschungarchivierun: Prevents automatic deletion/archiving. The audit log records who did what and why.

task_detail.was_wurde_getan_wie_ist_das_resultat_die: What has been done, and what is the result? This note appears in the task file and in automated reports.

stundenplan.no_data_hint: Pilot data is being set up for P1a on leander. See Decision-Log STP-KV4 for details.
stundenplan.subjects_p1b_hint: P1b will add: create subjects, rename, deactivate. For now you can only view the existing list.
stundenplan.detail_published_immutable_hint: Published entries are immutable — corrections create a new version.
stundenplan.entry_card_drag_hint: Click for details — drag to move
stundenplan.simulation_ok: Move is conflict-free — plan stays valid
stundenplan.score_disclaimer: These values evaluate the plan, not the people. Anonymously aggregated.
stundenplan.couplings_empty: No entries yet in this category.
stundenplan.coupling_kind_coupling_hint: Coupling: two or more entries that MUST happen at the same slot (e.g. Bio + Chemistry team-teaching).
stundenplan.coupling_kind_band_hint: Band: parallel courses of one year group (e.g. elective bands grade 9) running simultaneously.
stundenplan.coupling_kind_parallel_group_hint: Parallel group: same subject in multiple classes taught synchronously — useful for shared exams.
stundenplan.publish_check_ok: All hard constraints satisfied — plan is ready to publish.
stundenplan.publish_check_failed: Plan has hard violations — publication blocked (§7.0).
stundenplan.publish_check_explain: Publication requires hardConstraintScore = 100. Resolve violations first.
stundenplan.publish_history_empty: No publication for this tenant yet.
stundenplan.stammdaten_periods_empty: No periods yet — add at least one.
stundenplan.stammdaten_groups_hint: A class can have multiple groups (e.g. math half-group or elective). Create one group per constellation.
stundenplan.stammdaten_classes_hint: A class is a learning unit (e.g. "5a", "Q1"). It appears in the week grid, the curriculum hours and the Auto-Schedule.
stundenplan.stammdaten_classes_empty: No classes yet. Click "New class" to create one as a workspace space (incl. parent area).
stundenplan.stammdaten_group_class_required: This group type needs a class. Please pick one above.
stundenplan.stammdaten_group_offer_deactivate: Deactivate the group instead? It will disappear from dropdowns and lists, existing lessons remain functional and visible. You can re-activate later.
stundenplan.edit_mode_on_title: Enable edit mode — delete lessons directly in the grid
stundenplan.entry_create_draft_hint: Lesson is created as draft (planningStatus='draft'). Publication via the 'Publish' button.
stundenplan.entry_create_teacher_hint: Only staff members are shown. Other users (parents, students) are filtered out.
stundenplan.staff_roles_hint: Define functional roles: who is teacher, class lead, principal, in the substitute pool. As soon as the first teacher role is granted, the timetable picker filters only on these people.
stundenplan.staff_empty: No staff yet — please create users with UserType 'Teacher' etc. in admin portal first.
stundenplan.entry_edit_published_hint: Published lesson — saving creates a new version starting on the date you set; the old one stays for history.
stundenplan.entry_edit_retire_confirm: End this lesson on the chosen date?
stundenplan.stammdaten_nonteach_empty: No special days yet. Standard holidays come from the school calendar.
stundenplan.qual_empty: No subjects yet — teacher can teach any subject until qualifications are recorded.
stundenplan.stammdaten_nonteach_hint: Use this for special days only (conference day, changed school days). Standard holidays are maintained in the school calendar (Calendar world, "School" layer) — they appear here automatically as info.
stundenplan.stammdaten_nonteach_source_school_title: From the school calendar. Edit there.
stundenplan.plan_rules_hint: Tenant-wide rules that the score considers. They evaluate the plan as a whole, not individuals — anonymously aggregated.
stundenplan.pref_notes_placeholder: e.g. spare voice, morning only if possible
stundenplan.pref_hint: Preferences are organizational wishes, not contractual agreements. Contractual free days + commute compensation are handled in a separate initiative with DPO approval.
stundenplan.view_mine_title: Show only lessons that affect me
stundenplan.view_full_title: Complete plan including all classes + teachers (admin)
stundenplan.bulk_csv_hint: Paste CSV with header row. Required: subjectKey, groupKey, weekday (1=Mon, 7=Sun), periodSlotKey. Optional: roomLabel, weekParity, spansSlots, teacherIds (; separated), validFrom.
stundenplan.bulk_copy_hint: Copy all published lessons from one scenario to another (e.g. last year to new school year). Validity starts fresh.
stundenplan.solver_intro: The solver takes the current master data (curriculum hours, teachers, rooms, slots) and produces a proposal for the chosen scenario.
stundenplan.solver_no_jobs: No solver runs yet for this scenario.
stundenplan.solver_unplaced_title: Lessons that could not be placed
stundenplan.solver_accept_hint: Proposal ready. Click "Accept" to write the entries as drafts into the scenario.
stundenplan.solver_accept_confirm: Existing draft entries in the scenario will be removed and replaced by the solver proposal. Published lessons stay untouched. Continue?
stundenplan.readiness_button_title: Check whether all master data is in place for the Auto-Schedule
stundenplan.scenario_create_intro: A scenario is a draft schedule. You can have several in parallel (e.g. variant A and B for next school year). Only one is published at a time.
stundenplan.scenario_create_description_placeholder: Optional — what is this draft for?
stundenplan.scenario_create_base_hint: If set, Prilog copies the entries of the base scenario into the new draft. Useful for continuing from an existing variant.
stundenplan.scenario_delete_published_blocked: Published scenarios cannot be deleted. Change status first (e.g. archive).
stundenplan.scenario_delete_confirm_empty: Delete scenario? It contains no entries.
stundenplan.scenario_delete_confirm: Delete scenario? All lessons, pins, solver runs and publish events will be deleted too. Irreversible.
stundenplan.sidebar_start_wizard: Set up school year in 5 min
stundenplan.welcome_intro: You haven't created a school year yet. We'll guide you step by step — in 5 minutes you'll have your first schedule draft.
stundenplan.welcome_cta: Set up my first school year in 5 minutes
stundenplan.welcome_unfinished: You have an unfinished wizard — want to continue?
stundenplan.welcome_empty_scenario: or: Start with an empty scenario
stundenplan.wizard_step1_title: What's the name of your school year?
stundenplan.wizard_step1_intro: We suggest the current school year. You can rename anytime.
stundenplan.wizard_step1_hint: If you want to compare multiple variants later, simply create another scenario (e.g. "Variant with fewer gaps").
stundenplan.wizard_step2_title: Which school type do you teach?
stundenplan.wizard_step2_intro: We'll load the matching curriculum so you don't have to fill it by hand.
stundenplan.wizard_step2_skip: I have no matching template — maintain manually
stundenplan.wizard_step2_hint: The template provides a standard curriculum per grade. You can adjust per class later.
stundenplan.wizard_step3_title: Are all your classes set up?
stundenplan.wizard_step3_intro: A class is a learning unit like "5a" or "Q1". Used in the plan, the curriculum and the auto-schedule.
stundenplan.wizard_step3_empty: No classes yet. Create at least one — otherwise the plan has nothing to fill.
stundenplan.wizard_step3_hint: You can add more classes later — they show up in the plan automatically.
stundenplan.wizard_step3_no_jwt: Not logged in — please reload the page.
stundenplan.wizard_step3_create_failed: Create failed — backend didn't respond as expected.
stundenplan.wizard_step4_intro: Without subject assignment the auto-schedule doesn't know who teaches what. Recommended but not required.
stundenplan.wizard_step4_no_teachers: No teachers marked. Assign the role "teacher" in the workspace settings, or skip for now.
stundenplan.wizard_step4_skip: Edit later — Auto-Schedule score will be inaccurate
stundenplan.wizard_step4_hint: When qualifications are maintained, the Auto-Schedule can honor rules like "Ms. Smith only Math grades 5–7".
stundenplan.wizard_step5_intro: The plan needs rooms — and some subjects need specific ones (gym, lab).
stundenplan.wizard_step5_empty: No rooms yet. Create at least one — otherwise the plan has no place.
stundenplan.wizard_step5_hint: Tag special rooms (gym, lab, pc-pool) so the Auto-Schedule never puts e.g. Sport in a normal classroom.
stundenplan.wizard_step6_intro: We map your classes to the template automatically. You can adjust per class afterwards.
stundenplan.wizard_step6_intro_skip: You maintain the curriculum manually. We'll open the curriculum panel after creation.
stundenplan.wizard_step6_skip_hint: No curriculum import. Fill Math-4h-German-4h-… per class later in the master data.
stundenplan.wizard_step6_no_template: No template selected. Go back to step 2 or check "manual".
stundenplan.wizard_step7_intro: All master data ready. You decide: start the Auto-Schedule now or look around first.
stundenplan.deputat_gated: Area B (workload/HR planning data) is disabled. Activate in Settings → Privacy (DPO console), card "Timetable Area B".
stundenplan.stundentafel_hint: Per class: how many weekly hours per subject. Required for the auto-mode solver. Type into a cell, Enter saves. 0 or empty removes the subject from this class.
stundenplan.stundentafel_no_classes: No class spaces as InstructionGroup yet. First create a full class in the „Class groups" tab, then maintain the curriculum here.
stundenplan.stundentafel_copy_title: Apply this curriculum to other classes
stundenplan.lehrplan_choose_hint: Choose a template for your state. Templates are based on public regulations. You can adjust values per class afterwards.
stundenplan.lehrplan_map_hint: Assign the matching grade level to each class. Unassigned classes are skipped. Auto-mapping is based on class names.
stundenplan.lehrplan_unmapped_warning: The following classes could not be mapped automatically — please select manually:
stundenplan.lehrplan_preview_hint: Review the planned changes. They only take effect after clicking Apply.
stundenplan.lehrplan_subjects_to_create_title: These subjects will be created automatically
stundenplan.lehrplan_err_no_mappings: Please assign at least one class to a grade.
stundenplan.pin_section_hint: Choose which fields the auto-solver must NOT change. For couplings/bands, the pin auto-cascades to all other entries in the same set.
stundenplan.pin_remove_confirm: Remove pin constraint including all cascade pins?
stundenplan.pin_not_set: Lesson is not pinned (solver may change everything).
stundenplan.pin_cascade_notice: Auto-cascade: {{count}} other lessons in the same band/coupling were pinned as well.
stundenplan.subjects_tags_hint: Required tags (red): mandatory room type (e.g. 'lab' for Chemistry). Preferred tags (blue): preferred room type. Used by the auto-mode solver to match against room tags.
stundenplan.subject_tags_placeholder_hint: Examples: lab, gym, music_room, computer, beamer, whiteboard. Free choice — must match room tags exactly.
